title: Better Building
description: A modpack designed for builders, redstoners, map makers and more!
body:
A Modpack with the intent for builders with the use of _WorldEdit_ and _Axiom_. 

_Better Command Block UI_, and _CustomModelData Changer_ for map makers. 

_Redstone Tweaks_ Texturepack, and _G4mespeed_, _Pistorder_, and _Carpet_ for redstoneing and technical Minecraft players. 

And plenty more that will help with everything else, for any type of player.


As of 1.20.6+, **Litematica**, **Tweakeroo**, and **MiniHUD** are no longer being maintained on CurseForge, a trusted user has been porting them on GitHub. If you would like to download the mods for yourself they are linked below, and make sure to download **MaLiLib** as well, as it is needed for the other mods to function.

[Litematica](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica)
[Tweakeroo](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/tweakeroo)
[MiniHUD](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/minihud)
[MaLiLib](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/malilib)
